expectations.text: Calibrates before estimating: shows evidence of reading the effort value of at least 3 Done tickets from the board before producing the estimate
expectations.evidence: summary.md derives the bar from named Done tickets with efforts — Small: FM-23, FM-34; Medium: FM-7, FM-10, FM-37; Large: FM-9 — and notes the board has '21 Done tickets carry one' (Effort level select), all before the FM-24 match step. FM-23/FM-34 Small and FM-37 Medium are consistent with ground truth.

expectations.text: Produces SEPARATE Developer points and QA points, each with a stated effort-based reason
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md has 'Dev points: Large — full visual rebuild of one screen... tie broken upward on novelty + asset dependency' and a distinct 'QA points: Medium — ~6–8 BDD scenarios from the 11 AC... executed on Android and iOS, plus regression of the Sex/Neuter selectors'.

expectations.text: Sets the effort property using the board's observed scale value (Small / Medium / Large) via upsert-ticket-details.sh with --dry-run (captured in upsert-dry-run.txt)
expectations.evidence: upsert-dry-run.txt shows 'scripts/tracker/upsert-ticket-details.sh FM-24 --effort "Large" --dry-run' producing a PATCH payload that sets the 'Effort level' select to 'Large'.

expectations.text: Names at least 2 comparable tickets by key (FM-xx) that justify the estimate
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md's Comparables line names FM-9 (Large, the board's bar), FM-10 (Medium, exceeded on visual novelty) and FM-37 (Medium, wide-but-mechanical) with per-ticket justification.

expectations.text: QA estimate reasoning reflects the ticket's actual test burden (multi-element UI alignment against a Figma frame, Android+iOS visual verification) rather than restating the dev reasoning
expectations.evidence: QA line cites the 11 AC (copy parity, grid behavior incl. disabled tiles, selected state, CTA gate, hero composition, small/large device layout) 'executed on Android and iOS' plus selector/wizard regression — test-burden specific, not a restatement of the dev rationale.

expectations.text: Touches ONLY the effort property: no status/title/priority/description/body change in the dry-run payload; breakdown lives in the comment text, not the ticket body
expectations.evidence: The dry-run PATCH payload contains only {"properties":{"Effort level":{"select":{"name":"Large"}}}}; the dev/QA breakdown is in estimation-comment.md (summary.md: 'no comment posted — intended text in estimation-comment.md').
